name: Financial Data
description_en: Fetching and cross-validation rules for financial data used across AI Berkshire skills: revenue, profit, cash, market cap, valuation ratios, and DCF inputs.
description_zh: AI Berkshire 各技能共用的财务数据获取与交叉验证规范：收入、利润、现金、市值、估值指标与 DCF 输入。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It defines primary and secondary data sources by market (US/HK/A-shares), required cross-check tolerances, and commands for market-cap and valuation verification.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。它按市场（美股/港股/A股）规定主副数据源、交叉校验容差，并提供市值与估值验证命令。
sec_note_en: Runs local Python scripts and fetches public financial data from third-party sites. No credentials required; always cross-check against official filings.
sec_note_zh: 会运行本地 Python 脚本，并从第三方站点抓取公开财务数据。无需凭据；请始终与官方文件交叉核对。
